releaseNotes: Preview now uses the same renderer, queue, timing, and animation as live chat.
The Preview button now toggles between Preview and Tutup Preview.
Preview messages are natural Indonesian gameplay comments without update-related text.
The chat render area is taller while remaining limited to about half the monitor width.
Vertical positioning moves a fixed baseline and the chat stack always grows upward.
The update-success notification appears after OBS is ready and remains until OK is pressed.
The file-only updater preserves graceful OBS shutdown, SHA256 verification, rollback, cleanup, and automatic relaunch.
Approved live animation, queue, emoji, membership badges, polling, pinned behavior, and click-through remain unchanged.
